THE STORIES

Every bottle holds
a world you have never entered.

No. 001
غَسَق
GHASAQ
The Deepest Dark of Night
There is a moment
the world forgets to breathe.

Just before the first light,
when everything stands still.

The air is cold. The silence is heavy.
And something unseen begins to move. Ghasaq is not darkness.
It is what lives inside it.
TOPSea Salt · Cold Air · Cardamom
HEARTIncense Ash · Black Oud · Smoke
BASEWhite Musk · Amber · Vetiver
No. 002
أَثَر
ATHAR
A Trace Left Behind
Rain does not fall. It transforms.

It touches the ground,
awakens what was hidden,
and leaves something behind.

A trace. A memory. A presence. Athar is not the storm.
It is what remains after it.
TOPOzone · Wet Earth · Green Fig
HEARTRaw Leather · Black Rose · Smoke
BASEDark Amber · Moss · Patchouli
No. 003
وَهْم
WAHM
Illusion · Phantom Memory
You remember something.
But you don't know what.

A feeling. A face.
A moment that never fully existed.

It stays with you. Warms you. Haunts you. Wahm is not a memory.
It is the illusion of one.
TOPBlack Pepper · Saffron · Cinnamon
HEARTTobacco · Dark Vanilla · Rose Absolute
BASESandalwood · Benzoin · Labdanum
GHAIB is not a perfume brand.
It is an experience of the unseen.
Where luxury meets the strange. Where scent becomes memory.

Mysterious & Unexpected
RARE
